patientDetail.noForm: No form found for this patient.
patientDetail.deleteConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete the record for {{name}}?

This action cannot be undone. The patient and all responses will be removed.
patientDetail.deleteDoubleConfirm: FINAL CONFIRMATION: All data for this patient will be permanently deleted. Continue?

form.lockedFieldHint: This field cannot be changed in the follow-up

completion.title: Thank you!
completion.message: Your record has been submitted successfully. Your dentist now has access to your responses.
completion.closeHint: You may safely close this page.

blocked.title: Record already submitted
blocked.message: You may close this page. The follow-up form will be available after 90 days.

incomplete.title: Form in progress
incomplete.description: We found a form you started filling out. Would you like to continue where you left off?

blocked.title: Record already submitted
blocked.descriptionTemplate: Your record was submitted on {{date}}. To fill it out again or complete a follow-up, please contact your dentist.

controlEligible.title: Follow-up available
controlEligible.description: Your last record is more than 90 days old. Would you like to fill out the follow-up form?

severity.low: Low level detected. No major concerns.

cpf.label: What is your CPF (tax ID)?
cpf.description: We use your CPF to save your progress. If you need to stop, you can continue where you left off.

data_nascimento.label: What is your date of birth?

celular.label: What is your mobile phone number?

contato_emergencia.label: In case of emergency, who should we contact?

tempo_escovacao.label: How long do you spend brushing your teeth?

mudar_sorriso.label: What would you like to change about your smile?

expectativa_tratamento.label: What are your expectations for the treatment?
expectativa_tratamento.placeholder: What do you hope to achieve?

sensibilidade_frio.label: Are your teeth sensitive to cold?

fio_dental.label: Do you use dental floss every day?

dor_doce_gelado.label: Do you experience any pain when eating sweets or cold foods?

aperta_dentes_stress.label: Do you clench your teeth when under stress?

range_dentes_noite.label: Do you grind your teeth at night?

dor_cabeca_refeicoes.label: Do you experience headaches after meals?

extracao_implante.label: Have you ever had a tooth extraction or dental implant?

gosto_ruim_halito.label: Do you experience a bad taste or unpleasant breath?

bochecho_diario.label: Do you use a daily mouthwash?

tratamento_periodontal.label: Have you ever had periodontal treatment?

tratamento_ortodontico.label: Have you ever had orthodontic treatment?

feliz_estetica.label: Are you satisfied with your dental aesthetics?

experiencia_ruim.label: Did you have a bad experience during your last dental treatment?

medicamento_diario.label: Do you take any daily medication?

acorda_noite.label: Do you wake up frequently during the night?

acorda_noite_quantas.label: How many times do you wake up during the night?

banheiro_noite.label: Do you go to the bathroom frequently during the night?

banheiro_noite_quantas.label: How many times do you go to the bathroom during the night?

tratamento_medico.label: Are you currently undergoing any medical treatment?

historico_medico.label: Check the items that apply to your medical history:

comentarios.label: Personal comments
comentarios.description: Anything else you would like to share about your health?

alergia_medicamento.label: Are you allergic to any medication?

reposicao_hormonal.label: Are you on hormone replacement therapy?

queixa_principal.label: What is your chief complaint?
queixa_principal.description: Describe what bothers you the most

neuro_comentarios.label: Personal comments
neuro_comentarios.placeholder: Anything else you would like to share?

data_inicio_problema.label: Approximate onset date of the problem

tratamentos_anteriores.label: Previous treatments
tratamentos_anteriores.placeholder: Treatments you have undergone for this problem

evacua_diariamente.label: Do you have daily bowel movements?

desconforto_abdominal.label: Do you frequently experience abdominal discomfort or gas?

horario_dormir.label: What time do you usually go to sleep?

horario_acordar.label: What time do you usually wake up?

freq_atividade.label: How many days per week do you exercise?

periodo_atividade.label: What time of day do you exercise?

pain_map.label: Numerical pain scale: rate from 0 to 10
pain_map.description: Tap each region to indicate pain intensity

comentarios_dor.label: Comments about your pain
comentarios_dor.placeholder: Describe when and how you experience the pain...

orofacial_1.label: Do you have difficulty and/or pain when opening your mouth or chewing hard foods?

orofacial_2.label: Do you have joint noises (near the ear) when opening your mouth or chewing?

orofacial_3.label: Do you have a history of dental pain (fillings/root canal treatments)?

orofacial_4.label: Do you have a history of sinusitis?

sono_1.label: Do you wake up tired, with discomfort and/or pain in the facial muscles, or with morning headaches?

sono_2.label: Do you have any of these problems during sleep: respiratory disturbance, restless sleep, frequent awakening, choking episodes, periodic leg movements, waking up at night with sweating or dry mouth?

sono_3.label: Do you use sleep medication (tranquilizers, sedatives, etc.)?

sono_5.label: Do you experience memory deterioration, lack of concentration, physical or mental fatigue, or daytime sleepiness?

sono_6.label: Are you aware of having restless sleep, or grinding or clenching your teeth?

cronico_1.label: Chronic pain (migraine, facial pain, back pain, visceral pain, fibromyalgia, or others)?

cronico_2.label: Do you have a history of neurological disorders (ADHD, panic disorder, anorexia, bulimia, dyslexia, OCD, etc.)?

cronico_3.label: Do you chronically use pain medication or other medications?

cronico_4.label: Do you experience emotional changes (crying spells), lack of self-confidence, feelings of failure, loss of libido, loss of appetite or food compulsion, lack of motivation for leisure?

cronico_5.label: Does your diet include gluten and/or lactose (bread, milk, etc.)?

cronico_6.label: Do you regularly consume coffee, alcohol, tobacco, drugs, or chocolate?

grau_ansiedade.label: What is your level of tension and/or anxiety?

lipp_1.label: Muscle tension (e.g. jaw clenching, neck pain).

lipp_2.label: Thinking about one subject only or repeating the same thought.

lipp_3.label: Forgetting everyday things (e.g. where you put your keys).

lipp_5.label: Stomach hyperacidity (heartburn) with no apparent cause.

lipp_6.label: Sleep disturbance or sleeping too much/too little.

lipp_9.label: Feeling like you want to disappear.

lipp_10.label: Working at a level of competence below your normal.

lipp_11.label: Feeling of incompetence, that you won't be able to handle what is happening.

lipp_12.label: Feeling that nothing is worthwhile anymore.

brux_1.label: Do you complain of or experience pain in the head, face, neck, or shoulders?

brux_2.label: Do you feel tired or experience any facial discomfort upon waking?

brux_3.label: Do you have difficulty sleeping? (Restless and/or light sleep)

brux_4.label: Do you use any sleep medication?

brux_5.label: Do you have the habit of clenching or grinding your teeth?

brux_6.label: Do you regularly consume coffee, tobacco, or any other stimulant?

brux_7.label: Do you regularly consume gluten and/or lactose products (e.g. bread, milk, etc.)?

brux_8.label: Do you spend a lot of time watching TV and/or using your phone, computer, or tablet?

brux_9.label: Do you have hypertension, are overweight, or take weight-loss medication?

brux_10.label: Do you consider yourself a tense, nervous, or anxious person?

epworth_1.label: Sitting and reading
epworth_1.description: How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep in this situation?

epworth_2.label: Watching TV
epworth_2.description: How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep in this situation?

epworth_3.label: Sitting, inactive in a public place (e.g. a waiting room)
epworth_3.description: How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep in this situation?

epworth_4.label: As a passenger in a car for an hour without a break
epworth_4.description: How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep in this situation?

epworth_5.label: Lying down to rest in the afternoon when circumstances permit
epworth_5.description: How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep in this situation?

epworth_6.label: Sitting and talking to someone
epworth_6.description: How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep in this situation?

epworth_7.label: Sitting quietly after a lunch without alcohol
epworth_7.description: How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep in this situation?

epworth_8.label: In a car, while stopped for a few minutes in traffic
epworth_8.description: How likely are you to doze off or fall asleep in this situation?
